text: In order to comply with safety policies and procedures, the ship's crew and officers must:

options.text: A) Minimize the use of alcohol
B) Focus on delivering the ship and cargo at all costs
C) Stop unsafe practices which may cause accidents, injury, or environmental pollution

explanation: Maritime safety culture mandates that any practice deemed unsafe must be immediately ceased to prevent accidents or pollution. Following established safety protocols takes precedence over operational speed or commercial pressure to ensure the vessel, crew, and environment remain protected.
